In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. Selected channelsTelegram — simplest way to get started — register a bot with @BotFather and get going.Updated ~/.openclaw/openclaw.jsonWorkspace OK: ~/.openclaw/workspaceSessions OK: ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions Selected Telegram with @BotFather Updated/.openclaw/ json Workspace OK/.openclaw/ Sessions OK/.openclaw/. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: 🦞 Best Platform for Using OpenClaw Bot? (Telegram/Discord/Slack ...
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

From a developer’s perspective, which platform works best for interacting with the OpenClaw bot — **Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, or Slack**? Integrating the OpenClaw bot into your daily workflow can significantly enhance your productivity. When it comes to choosing the best platform for this integration, Redditors have shared their experiences and recommendations across various platforms like Telegram, Discord, Slack, and WhatsApp. Here’s a succinct guide to help you make an informed decision:. "For dev workflows, Discord is honestly the best option if you need clean markdown and code blocks.". **Pros**: Reliable for work, threads keep contexts clean, good support for code blocks and tables. **Markdown/Code Output**: Discord and Slack excel in providing clean markdown and code block support. **Automation/Webhooks**: All platforms support webhooks, but Discord and Slack are often preferred for their ease of integration. By considering these insights from the Reddit community, you can choose the best platform for integrating your OpenClaw bot and optimize your workflow.

Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Scheduled Tasks Guide | MI - Meta Intelligence
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Cron Scheduled Tasks Guide. Diagram of OpenClaw Cron scheduled task automation execution. If you're familiar with Linux's `crontab`, OpenClaw's Cron is conceptually similar -- it automatically executes tasks at specified times. But the key difference is: traditional crontab executes fixed Shell commands, while OpenClaw's Cron executes **natural language instructions**, with the AI agent autonomously deciding how to complete them. If a Cron task's execution time exceeds this value, the Gateway will forcibly terminate the connection, causing the task to be truncated -- the agent may have completed 80% of the work, but cannot return results due to the timeout. Cron is the key feature that transforms OpenClaw from a "passive tool" into a "proactive assistant." Once configured, the agent automatically executes tasks and reports results at your specified times -- you don't need to remember what to check, don't need to open a terminal, and don't need to be at the computer.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Jobs: 8 Automation Templates, Schedules, and ...
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.
